ratings.instrument: bank facilities (Cash Credit INR45.25cr, Term Loan INR33.08cr, Proposed Fund-Based Limits INR21.67cr)
ratings.note: First-time rating: CRISIL BBB+/Stable on ~INR100cr of bank facilities (Cash Credit INR45.25cr, Term Loan INR33.08cr, Proposed Fund-Based Limits INR21.67cr). Cites experienced promoters, diversified product profile, healthy order book, and comfortable financial risk profile.
ratings.source: CRISIL Ratings, disclosed to exchanges 3 Jul 2026
